name: Reflex Plus Adult Cat Food Canned - Chicken Chunks in Gravy 0.4kg - Pack of 12

tags.name: Bulk Cat Food & Bulk Dog Food

shortDescription: Full-balanced, chicken protein-containing canned (wet) cat food carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult breeds.
description: Reflex Plus Chicken Adult Cat Canned Food (Pack of 12) , fully-balanced, chicken protein-containing cat food carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult breeds. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Crude Protein (%) - 6.5 Crude Oils & Fats (%) - 3.5 Crude Fiber (%) - 0.5 Moisture (%) - 82 Crude Ash (%) - 2.5 Vitamin A (Min) - 1400 IE/kg Vitamin D3 (Min) - 180 IE/kg Iron - 8 mg/kg Copper - 1.2 mg/kg Iodine - 0.21 mg/kg Manganese - 1.6 mg/kg Zinc - 8.0 mg/kg Selenium - 0.02 mg/kg INGREDIENTS: Meat & Animal Derivatives (Chicken 4% min.), Cereals, Fish and Fish Derivatives, Minerals, Veg. Protein Extracts, Preservers and Colourants. FEEDING RECOMMENDATION: An adult cat (approx. 4kg) requires up to 3 meals per day, where 1 can serves 2 meals. Individual requirements depend on factors like age, breed and activity. Serve at room temperature. Store in a cool, dry place. Not fit for human consumption.
